title: Resource Allocation in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger resource allocation in practice judgment so strategy work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Resource Allocation in Practice is a leverage point inside strategy. It supports the broader goal of vision, positioning, competitive analysis, and strategic planning.
coreConcepts: Resource Allocation in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good resource allocation in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Resource Allocation in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
